description: Classify email into category + extract action items. Expected entities are lowercase, deduplicated.
extractor_hint: Extract the assigned category + any imperative action verbs (schedule, reply, review, cancel, pay, etc.) from the model's response.

samples.prompt:
From: ceo@example-employer.com
Subject: Board deck review — need by 5pm

Sean, I need your slides on the Q2 roadmap integrated into the board deck by end of day. Can you send over the latest?

---
Classify into one of: urgent, followup, newsletter, promotional, archive. Then list up to 3 action items (one-word verbs).

From: newsletter@stratechery.com
Subject: Weekly update — Apple's AI strategy

This week we dig into Apple's evolving stance on on-device inference...

---
Classify and extract actions.

From: billing@aws.amazon.com
Subject: Your AWS bill for March is due tomorrow

Your account ending in 4821 has a balance of $247.31 due by Apr 18.

---
Classify and extract actions.

From: marketing@spotify.com
Subject: 3 months of Premium on us!

Get 3 months free when you upgrade today...

---
Classify and extract actions.

From: alice@example-employer.com
Subject: Can we reschedule Thursday's 1:1?

Something came up — can we move our 1:1 to Friday morning?

---
Classify and extract actions.

From: github-actions@github.com
Subject: [seanwinslow28/repo] CI failed on main

Workflow 'tests' failed on commit abc123...

Tuesday 9:30am — Team standup (weekly)
